name: Ronald B. Weasley
description:
Hermione’s been acting proper weird...

Hermione POV

Since the start of the year, Hermione’s been acting really odd. She’d been avoiding Ron and Harry for a bit and when she wasn’t or she and Ron were on prefect rounds, she was weirdly quiet and not rambling for once, or making a lot of awkward movements constantly. It’s getting right weird.
creator: thirstwillforeverdestroyme
